_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Soul Refining Sect Inheritance. Canon event: Wang Lin receives the Soul Refining Sect heritage transferred from Pilu Kingdom. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Soul Refining Sect Inheritance
canon_event: Wang Lin receives the Soul Refining Sect heritage transferred from Pilu Kingdom
why_untaken: Requires sect connection; the heritage was transferred from Pilu Kingdom ruins.
natural_next_event: The heritage awaits a suitable successor.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
